_meta.purpose: Rewritten /api/experience.json — work history reframed for context-engineer narrative. Lead with independent practice + commerce.com Product Architect role, then prior employment as continuous trajectory.

name: Nino Chavez — Work History
description: Independent practice plus continuous enterprise architecture employment since 2015.

item.description: Codified a working practice for AI-assisted software development. Built and shipped a six-tool open toolchain, an AI governance framework (AEGIS), and a session voice corpus. Used the toolchain to ship 5 lead case studies under his own brand (Rally HQ + blueprint surface, Atelier, Ask BC, Photography, bc-subscriptions). Independent of the day-job employment below.
Product architecture at commerce.com. Internal work; separate from the independent context-engineering practice surfaced on this site.
Strategic enterprise architecture advisory for Fortune 500 commerce transformations.
Delivery architecture leadership across multi-region commerce platform implementations.
Commerce domain architecture for grocery e-commerce platform.
Enterprise architecture for commerce transformation programs.
Commerce platform delivery and architecture leadership.
